title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mindtree

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mindtree
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
